examples: A new method for determining 2, 4-dinitrophenol based on resin phase spectrophotometry was reported.
The electrode reduction process of 2,4-dinitrophenol is irreversible with adsorptive characteristics.
Characteristics of anaerobic granules before and after acclimation, removal efficiencies of 2, 6-dinitrophenol (2, 6-dnp) were investigated in a lab-scale UASB reactor.
